title: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="400" height="300"><rect x="20" y="20" width="360" height="260" rx="10" fill="#C06C88"/><rect x="50" y="50" width="300" height="200" rx="5" fill="#B7D7CD"/><rect x="30" y="70" width="340" height="180" rx="10" fill="#411C56"/><text x="120" y="140" font-size="24" fill="#fff">Media Library</text><text x="200" y="180" font-size="18" fill="#aaa">Upload, Filter, and Manage</text><path d="M 100,220 C 120,220 120,200 100,200" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/><g><text x="80" y="220" font-size="18" fill="#fff">Name</text><rect x="90" y="240" width="200" height="20" rx="5" fill="#090a0f"/><text x="80" y="260" font-size="18" fill="#fff">Category</text><rect x="90" y="270" width="200" height="20" rx="5" fill="#090a0f"/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Should include a search bar to filter media content

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, search bar functionality, and media upload feature.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
